CustomMetadata.label: GU-005 - Guest profile has View All Records on any object

values.value: Guest profile has View All Records on any object
The guest user has PermissionsViewAllRecords=true on one or more objects. This bypasses sharing rules and grants unauthenticated users visibility into all records of that object type.
Unauthenticated users can see all records regardless of ownership or sharing rules. A single API call from a public IP can return the entire dataset for the affected object.
Remove PermissionsViewAllRecords from guest object settings. Grant Read access only to specific records intended for public consumption using sharing rules or Apex-managed sharing.
